children.heading: Basis for award
children.label: a Basis for award
children.text: The Foundation is authorized to award scholarships to persons who demonstrate outstanding potential for and who plan to pursue a career in public service. Award recipients shall be known as Truman scholars.

children.heading: Maximum period of award
children.label: b Maximum period of award
children.text: Scholarships under this chapter shall be awarded for such periods as the Foundation may prescribe but not to exceed four academic years.

children.heading: Recipient’s choice of institution
children.label: c Recipient’s choice of institution
children.text: A student awarded a scholarship under this chapter may attend any institution of higher education offering courses of study, training, or other educational activities designed to prepare persons for a career in public service as determined pursuant to criteria established by the Foundation.

children.heading: Encouragement of recipient to pursue public service career
children.label: d Encouragement of recipient to pursue public service career
children.text: Each student awarded a scholarship under this chapter must have indicated a serious intent to enter the public service upon the completion of his or her educational program. Each institution of higher education at which such a student is in attendance will make reasonable continuing efforts to encourage such a student to enter the public service upon completing his or her educational program.
